qa.question: Find the highest-utilization revolving account on the credit report's utilization chart; what is that account's credit limit per the tradeline table?
qa.question_rephrased: Looking at the utilization chart in the credit report, identify the revolving account with the greatest utilization, then state its credit limit as listed in the tradeline table.
qa.rephrase_note: Same multi-hop intent (max-utilization revolving account -> credit limit from tradeline table); answer unchanged; well reworded.

qa.question: How many pages does the single longest document in this file span?

qa.rephrase_note: Same intent (page span of longest single document); answer unchanged; reworded.

qa.rephrase_note: Same intent (date of chart low point); 'trough/bottoms out' = lowest point; answer unchanged.

qa.rephrase_note: Both clauses preserved (P&I slice amount + tie to CD projected payment); answer unchanged.
